# Phase Roadmap Project

A mature local knowledge pipeline with long documentation and roadmap phases.

## Getting Started

Install dependencies and run the dashboard.

## Phase 2 Roadmap

Phase 2 focuses on making the knowledge graph richer, more trustworthy, and faster to query.

### Phase 2A - Knowledge Usability

- Graph Health Baseline
- Concept Definitions
- Wikilink Injection

### Future Enhancement - Document Ingestion Engine

Evaluate uploaded PDF, DOCX, and PPTX parsing before adding dependencies.

## What to avoid in Phase 2

- Managed vector databases
- Heavy dashboard UI before the graph is richer
